name: miniclaw-os
description: AugmentedMike's AI operating system — plugins, tools, and infrastructure for OpenClaw

plugins.label: Brain Board
plugins.description: State-machine kanban board — the agent's prefrontal cortex. Task planning, project tracking, cron dispatch queue.

plugins.label: Smart Context
plugins.description: Memory window management — hippocampus. Controls history pruning, image limits, tool result truncation.

plugins.label: Designer
plugins.description: Image generation via Gemini — occipital lobe. Canvas-based image creation with layer support.

plugins.label: Knowledge Base
plugins.description: Vector-backed long-term memory — semantic search over facts, errors, workflows, decisions.

plugins.label: Rolodex
plugins.description: Contact browser — fast, searchable access to trusted contacts. Search by name, email, phone, domain, or tag.

plugins.label: Message Queue
plugins.description: Haiku triage for all messaging sessions — IMMEDIATE/QUICK/TASK classification, soul context injection, tool call limit.

plugins.label: Soul
plugins.description: Workspace file management and identity backup — SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, AGENTS.md snapshots.

plugins.label: Trust
plugins.description: Ed25519 agent identity and mutual authentication — cryptographic handshakes between agents.

plugins.label: Email
plugins.description: Autonomous Gmail triage — IMAP inbox polling, Haiku classification (6 categories), reply-as-AM, archive, and escalation to owner@example.com.

plugins.label: Jobs
plugins.description: Role-specific job templates with workflows, procedures, and review gates for agents.

plugins.label: Substack
plugins.description: Substack publishing — drafts, images, scheduling, EN/ES post workflow.

plugins.label: Backup
plugins.description: Daily tgz backups of the MiniClaw state directory with tiered retention (recent dailies → monthly → yearly).

plugins.label: Stripe
plugins.description: Shared Stripe payment service — charge, refund, customer management. Other plugins consume via CLI or direct import.

plugins.label: Square
plugins.description: Square payment service — charge, refund, payment links. Zero deps, raw fetch to Square REST API v2.

plugins.label: Authenticator
plugins.description: TOTP 2FA code generation — Google Authenticator compatible. Gives the agent autonomous 2FA capability.

plugins.label: Booking
plugins.description: Appointment scheduling with Turso cloud DB, payment provider integration, and embeddable booking widget.

plugins.label: Slack
plugins.description: Slack workspace integration — send messages, read channels, react to threads.

plugins.label: Discord
plugins.description: Discord bot bridge — relay messages, moderate channels, respond to commands.

plugins.label: Twitter / X
plugins.description: Post tweets, read timelines, engage with mentions and DMs on X.

plugins.label: GitHub
plugins.description: GitHub automation — open PRs, review code, manage issues, sync repos.

plugins.label: Calendar
plugins.description: Google Calendar sync — read events, create meetings, check availability.

plugins.label: Notes
plugins.description: Structured note-taking — daily journals, meeting notes, tagged snippets.

plugins.label: Analytics
plugins.description: Usage analytics dashboard — track agent runs, token spend, task completion rates.

plugins.label: Monitor
plugins.description: Uptime and health monitoring — ping endpoints, alert on failures, track latency.

plugins.label: Deploy
plugins.description: Deployment automation — push to Vercel, Fly.io, or custom SSH targets.

plugins.label: Test Runner
plugins.description: Automated test execution — run suites, report coverage, flag regressions.

plugins.label: Translate
plugins.description: Multi-language translation — localize content, translate messages, detect language.

plugins.label: Voice
plugins.description: Voice synthesis and transcription — text-to-speech, speech-to-text, voice memos.

plugins.label: Web Search
plugins.description: Web search integration — query search engines, summarize results, extract facts.

plugins.label: Notify
plugins.description: Push notifications — send alerts via Pushover, ntfy, or webhooks.

plugins.label: PDF
plugins.description: PDF generation and parsing — create invoices, extract text, merge documents.

plugins.label: CRM
plugins.description: Customer relationship management — track leads, log interactions, pipeline stages.

plugins.label: Invoice
plugins.description: Invoice generation — create, send, and track invoices with payment status.

plugins.label: Scraper
plugins.description: Web scraping — extract structured data from websites, monitor page changes.

plugins.label: Forms
plugins.description: Form builder — create intake forms, surveys, and feedback collectors with webhooks.

cli.name: mc-smoke
cli.description: Health check — verifies all miniclaw components are installed and running

cli.name: mc-doctor
cli.description: Diagnostics and auto-repair — identifies and fixes common configuration issues

cli.name: mc-update
cli.description: Check for and apply updates from the stable release — runs daily at 4am automatically

crons.name: board-worker-backlog
crons.description: Triage: surveys backlog, selects best candidate per project (max 3), fills details, moves to in-progress

crons.name: board-worker-in-progress
crons.description: Triage: surveys in-progress, selects best per project (max 3), does one unit of work, checks criteria

crons.name: board-worker-in-review
crons.description: Triage: surveys in-review, selects best per project (max 3), verifies + deploys, ships or fails back

crons.name: email-triage-cron
crons.description: Email watch: checks IMAP inbox for new messages, classifies via Haiku, replies/archives/escalates

launchAgents.name: com.augmentedmike.miniclaw-brain-web
launchAgents.description: Brain board web UI — standalone.mjs server on port 4220

vaultSecrets.description: Gmail app password for email integration
Gemini API key for mc-designer (image generation)
Stripe secret API key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...)
Stripe publishable API key (pk_test_... or pk_live_...)
Square personal access token for payment processing
Turso auth token for mc-booking database

apps.label: AM Setup Wizard
apps.description: Consumer onboarding wizard and personal dashboard for first-time AM installation. No terminal required.
